title: - Format:
content:
- Format:
| ([s][e][n][t][e][n][c][e]) ([w][o][r][d]) ([l][e][v][e][l]) |
- Use: Precision referencing, remix logic, semantic threading

⚙️ MODULE: RGLE (Recursive Generative Language Engine)
- Core logic loop:
Input → Parse → Annotate → Rebuild → Store → Repeat
- Capable of: Remapping mythic structures, recomposing texts, generating symbol sets
- Connected to: Symbol archive, user queries, regenerative prompts

💾 MODULE: ARCHIVE_OS
- Stores versioned threads of language, idea history, remix chains
- Formats:
- Canon layers (e.g., original source text)
- Meta-notations (tags, transformations)
- Mutation logs (all changes and forks)

🔌 MODULE: LLM (optional)
- Acts as transformer or accelerator for:
- Generating initial drafts
- Language mutation layers
